brief.name: HORLOGE
brief.industry: Swiss luxury watch rental subscription service
brief.audience: Watch collectors aged 35-65, household income $300k+, who own multiple watches but want exposure to rotating high-end pieces (Patek, AP, Lange) without 6-figure purchase commitments. Value heritage and provenance over status display.
brief.tone: heritage, considered, quiet, scholarly, confident, unhurried, austere
brief.references: Audemars Piguet's printed catalog typography, Hodinkee's editorial voice, the Wallpaper* magazine masthead, Phaidon's art monographs, A. Lange & Söhne's brand voice
brief.context: Hero must include the word "HORLOGE" set in massive type, spanning multiple lines if needed. Three subscription tiers: Standard ($299/mo, 1 watch rotation monthly), Premium ($899/mo, 2 watches + early access to new acquisitions), Atelier ($2,400/mo, 3 watches + dedicated concierge + full insurance). FAQ must address authenticity verification, insurance coverage, return logistics, damage policy, and waitlist procedure for grail pieces.
brief.avoid: Anything that feels like a typical SaaS pricing page. Stock photos of men in suits. Words like "elevate" or "unlock" or "experience". Discount badges or "limited time offer" framing. Anything implying speculation or investment ROI.
